Dear Accommodation Office
I am writting in connection with requesting an extension to my dormitory lease for an additional month. My current lease will end on  next wekk, but I would like to stay until one month.Please let me know if this is possible and what steps I need to take.

Thank you for your help.
writing.task2: I don’t agree. In my option online certificates can teach useful skills quickly, but a university degree still gives a more complete education. A degree helps students learn how to think, solve problems, and make connections with other people in their field. For example, in computer science, an online course can show you how to code, but a university program also teaches the theory and methods behind the code, which are important for more difficult work.
writing.task3: A bar chart compares monthly subscriptions to three music-streaming platforms (StreamX, AudioWave, MelodyHub) from January to June. That chart showing popular music trends, all three music-streaming platforms have a high subsciptions. MelodyHub is a prominent example for main trend with steep jump impression from 0.6M to 1.3M in April
